albums.title: Cake & Jazz Vol. 3
albums.description: The third edition of Cake & Jazz brought together the finest patisseries of Sofia alongside an evening of intimate jazz. A magical night of music, flavour, and connection.

albums.title: Cake & Jazz Vol. 2
albums.description: Building on the success of the first edition, Vol. 2 expanded to a larger venue and featured guest musicians from across Europe. An unforgettable evening of sweet melodies.

albums.title: Cake & Jazz Vol. 1
albums.description: Where it all began. The first Cake & Jazz event was an intimate gathering that combined artisan cakes with live jazz performance. A concept born from a love of two great pleasures.
